features.name: RichFunctionView Tests
features.description: Tests for the compute-utils RichFunctionView library, covering simple and complex input forms, dataframe handling, arithmetic helpers, error propagation, and multi-argument function calls.
features.evidence_summary: All three RFV scripts mention 'RichFunctionView' in their description, and the arithmetic/DF mock functions are classic RFV fixture helpers whose names (TestAdd2, TestDF1, etc.) match the compute-utils RFV test conventions; changelog v1.4.2 notes 'Updated tests for synchronous RFV'.

features.name: Validation Library Tests
features.description: Tests for the compute-utils input-validation library, covering range validators, async validators, global validators, and validator action callbacks.
features.evidence_summary: Factory functions named *ValidatorFactory / *ValidatorDemoFactory pair 1-to-1 with scripts described as 'Custom validators test' and 'Global validators test', forming a tightly named validation test cluster.

features.name: ComputeAPI / CompositionPipeline Tests
features.description: Tests for the compute-utils ComputeAPI and CompositionPipeline libraries, using numbered mock-wrapper functions as registered function stubs that the pipeline harness can compose and call.
features.evidence_summary: Changelog v1.1.0 adds 'tests for CompositionPipeline' and v1.2.0 adds 'tests for ComputeAPI'; the five uniformly-numbered MockWrapper functions are the registered stubs that both test layers require for pipeline composition.

features.name: UI Component Library Tests
features.description: Tests for the Datagrok UI component library, covering viewer components, form components, and general UI elements.
features.evidence_summary: All three functions carry a 'test' tag and their names directly reference UI-layer concepts (viewer, form/from, elements), distinct from the compute/validation clusters.
